_README: Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ) — the agency that issues electrical permits for the project. Keyed by 'city, ST' lowercase. Default rule: city building dept inside city limits, county building dept for unincorporated areas. For projects with an unusual AHJ structure (e.g., HOA + city + state architectural board), the wizard still asks the user to confirm — this data set just pre-fills the most likely answer.

phoenix, az.ahj_name: City of Phoenix Planning & Development Dept

tucson, az.ahj_name: City of Tucson Permits & Code Services Section

scottsdale, az.ahj_name: City of Scottsdale Planning & Development Services

los angeles, ca.ahj_name: Los Angeles Dept of Building & Safety (LADBS)

san diego, ca.ahj_name: City of San Diego Development Services Dept

san francisco, ca.ahj_name: San Francisco Dept of Building Inspection (SFDBI)

san jose, ca.ahj_name: City of San Jose Building Division

sacramento, ca.ahj_name: City of Sacramento Community Development Dept

tampa, fl.ahj_name: City of Tampa Construction Services Center

jacksonville, fl.ahj_name: City of Jacksonville Building Inspection Division

atlanta, ga.ahj_name: City of Atlanta Office of Buildings

honolulu, hi.ahj_name: City & County of Honolulu Dept of Planning & Permitting (DPP)
honolulu, hi.note: Special: Hawaii also has state-level energy review (Rule 14H solar applications routed through utility, not AHJ).

chicago, il.ahj_name: City of Chicago Dept of Buildings

boston, ma.ahj_name: City of Boston Inspectional Services Dept (ISD)

detroit, mi.ahj_name: City of Detroit Buildings Safety Engineering & Environmental Dept

minneapolis, mn.ahj_name: City of Minneapolis Community Planning & Economic Development

new york, ny.note: Solar PV requires DOB filing + ConEd interconnection. Filing usually via NYC DOB NOW.

portland, or.ahj_name: City of Portland Bureau of Development Services (BDS)

pittsburgh, pa.ahj_name: City of Pittsburgh Dept of Permits Licenses & Inspections

austin, tx.ahj_name: City of Austin Development Services Dept

san antonio, tx.ahj_name: City of San Antonio Development Services Dept

fort worth, tx.ahj_name: City of Fort Worth Development Services

spokane, wa.ahj_name: City of Spokane Development Services Center
